title: 9分达人听力6 Test 6 Listening
source: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

groups.title: Damaged Fridge Report
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Damaged Fridge Report • Warranty: 3 years • Model: $1$ Mount • Colour: $2$ • Date of purchase: $3$ • Problems: – the non-stop $4$ – $5$ degrees • The repair shop: Ken's Appliance (near to the $6$) • The customer needs to store food for her $7$ shop. • Total value of loss: $8$ $ Things to do: • Ask the $9$ to call back. • Replace the damaged $10$.

questions.title: Model: 【   】 Mount
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Model、Mount；提示词 Model，此处应填型号名称。
题目解析：本题比较容易定位，难度不大。题干 Mount 首字母大写，属于型号名称的一部分，在录音中不会发生替换，且必定会出现在答案附近。在听到定位词 Model 原词重现后，注意听之后的回答，Mount 之前的词汇即为答案。因此答案为 Top。

questions.title: Colour: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Colour；提示词 Colour，此处应填表示颜色的形容词。
题目解析：紧跟上一题，定位词 Colour 原词重现，接着听到回答："It's a silver one."抓取符合预判的词汇即可。因此答案为 silver。注意拼写速度及准确性。另外，在雅思听力中，家用电器的颜色考查最多的词就是 silver（银白色），其他常考的颜色还有 white（白色）和 cream（淡黄色）。

questions.title: Date of purchase: 【   】
questions.answer: January 12(th) / January 12th / January 12 / 12(th) January / 12th January / 12 January
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Date；提示词 Date、purchase，此处应填购买日期。
题目解析：本题考查条件限定及信息填写的完整性，是本篇 Part 1 中最容易出错的一道题。注意 purchase 为条件限定，暗示空白处要填写的是购买日期。录音中先听到了 January 15th，这是冰箱送达（delivered）的日期，不符合题干要求，先记下月份，因为第二次出现的时间信息未必是完整的，随后顾客提到的第二个时间信息是 12th，这才是 purchase 的时间。在填写答案时，先写或后写月份都可以，但一定要保证信息的完整性，不能漏掉月份。因此答案为 January 12(th) 或 12(th) January。

questions.title: the non-stop 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Problems；提示词 non-stop，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题考查冰箱出现的其中一个问题。提示词 non-stop 为形容词，在录音中比较容易发生替换。听到 problem 以问句形式出现之后，注意听顾客的回答："First there is something wrong with the alarm."记下符合预判的名词 alarm，随后听到 non-stop 的同义替换 beeping continuously 出现。因此答案为 alarm。在以往的冰箱维修场景中，除了 alarm 之外，常考查的易坏部件还有 fan（风扇）、light 及后面题目中出现的 door。

questions.title: 【   】 degrees
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 degrees，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题考查冰箱出现的另外一个问题，即温度上的异常。录音中通过 there's also a problem with … 引出了 temperature control 这个问题。随后听到了两个数字，分别是 10 和 minus 8。需要注意的是，空白处要求填写的是异常的温度，在录音中被表述为现在的温度，而 minus 8 是顾客原本设置的正常温度，注意排除干扰。因此答案为 10 或 ten。注意当答案为数字时，写字母或写阿拉伯数字都可以，在符合题目字数要求的情况下，更建议写阿拉伯数字。

questions.title: Ken's Appliance (near to the 【   】)
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Ken's Appliance；提示词 near to、the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 Ken's Appliance 是专有名词，在录音中不会发生替换，比较容易定位，答案句为："… is located on Elm Street, just a few steps from the station."其中 a few steps from 替换了题干中的 near to。因此答案为 station。

questions.title: The customer needs to store food for her 【   】 shop.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 shop；提示词 shop，此处应填名词或形容词。
题目解析：通过题干可知，空白处答案会出现在顾客的话中，且 shop 不易发生替换。答案句为："… actually it was used to store food for my sandwich shop."答案句与题干相比变化不大，抓取 shop 之前的词汇即可。因此答案为 sandwich。注意答案不可写成复数形式，因为一般情况下都是不可数名词或可数名词的单数形式修饰名词（sports centre 等特例除外）。

questions.title: Total value of loss: 【   】 $
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Total value、loss；提示词 $，此处应填数字。
题目解析：注意 Total 为条件限定，暗示空白处要填写的是损失的总数额。定位词 Total value 和 loss 原词重现于工作人员的询问中，随后在顾客的回答中首先听到了 50 和 100，分别对应蔬菜费用和肉类费用，为干扰信息，接着听到："So the overall loss is about $180."其中 overall 替换了题干中的 Total。因此答案为 180。数字 180 会出现连读，发音与 190 很像，注意区分和跟读模仿。

questions.title: Ask the 【   】 to call back.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 call；提示词 ask、call，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：本题与上一题相隔较远，需耐心往下听，注意抓取符合预判的词汇。在听到顾客询问 "Is there anyone who …" 时，注意听工作人员的回答："I'll have the manager ring you later."其中 have … ring you 替换了题干中的 Ask … to call back，抓取表示人的名词即可。因此答案为 manager。

questions.title: Replace the damaged 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 damaged，此处应填表示冰箱部件的名词。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，题干中的词都比较容易发生替换。注意通过对话的推进抓取符合题干要求的词汇。题干要求填写冰箱损坏的部件名称，在听到顾客询问 "… what exactly is wrong with the fridge?" 时就应集中注意力，随后听到了 the door … has to be fixed 以及 the door is dented，都对应题干的 damaged，即使不知道 dented 的意思，也可以通过 fixed 大致判断这就是要找的答案，然后再通过 have to be replaced 进行确认。因此答案为 door。

transcript.en: Man: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: Man: Ken's Appliance.
transcript.cn: 这里是肯氏电器（Ken's Appliance）。

transcript.en: Man: Can I help you?
transcript.cn: 有什么可以帮您的吗？

transcript.en: Woman: Yes.
transcript.cn: 是这样的。

transcript.en: Woman: I'm ringing about my fridge.
transcript.cn: 我打电话是想问问我的冰箱。

transcript.en: Woman: It's not working at the moment.
transcript.cn: 它现在坏了，不制冷了。

transcript.en: Man: I'd like to find out a few more details, if I may.
transcript.cn: 方便的话，我想再多了解几个细节。

transcript.en: Woman: Yes, sure.
transcript.cn: 好的，没问题。

transcript.en: Man: First I need to make sure if your fridge is still covered by warranty.
transcript.cn: 首先我得确认一下您的冰箱还在不在保修期内。

transcript.en: Woman: Oh, right.
transcript.cn: 哦，好的。

transcript.en: Woman: I bought it just last week and it originally came with 2 years of warranty coverage, but I've extended the period to 3 years.
transcript.cn: 我上周才买的，原本自带两年保修，不过我把保修期延长到了三年。

transcript.en: Woman: So it's definitely under warranty.
transcript.cn: 所以肯定还在保修期内。

transcript.en: Man: Right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Man: Now, what model is it?
transcript.cn: 那它是什么型号的？

transcript.en: Woman: Let me take a look … It should be somewhere on this warranty card.
transcript.cn: 我看看……型号应该就在这张保修卡上的某个地方。

transcript.en: Woman: Oh, here, on the top right-hand corner.
transcript.cn: 哦，找到了，在右上角。

transcript.en: Woman: It's a Top Mount.
transcript.cn: 是Top Mount（顶置式）的。

transcript.en: Man: And the colour of the fridge?
transcript.cn: 那冰箱是什么颜色的呢？

transcript.en: Woman: It's a silver one.
transcript.cn: 银色的。

transcript.en: Woman: It is really modern and perfectly matches the whole décor of my kitchen.
transcript.cn: 它特别现代，跟我厨房的整体装修风格搭得刚刚好。

transcript.en: Man: I've made a note of that.
transcript.cn: 我记下来了。

transcript.en: Man: So can you tell me the exact date you purchased the fridge?
transcript.cn: 那您能告诉我买这台冰箱的具体日期吗？

transcript.en: Woman: I remember it was delivered on January 15th.
transcript.cn: 我记得是1月15日送到的。

transcript.en: Woman: I must have bought it a couple of days earlier.
transcript.cn: 那我买的时间肯定还得往前推几天。

transcript.en: Woman: Right, it was on the 12th.
transcript.cn: 对，是12号买的。

transcript.en: Man: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Man: Then what is the problem with the fridge?
transcript.cn: 那冰箱到底出了什么问题呢？

transcript.en: Woman: Oh, it's a complete disaster.
transcript.cn: 哎，简直是一团糟。

transcript.en: Woman: First there is something wrong with the alarm.
transcript.cn: 首先是警报器出了毛病。

transcript.en: Woman: I mean it is beeping continuously, even when the door is shut.
transcript.cn: 我是说它一直在响，哪怕门关着也响个不停。

transcript.en: Woman: It's really annoying.
transcript.cn: 太烦人了。

transcript.en: Woman: And there's also a problem with its temperature control.
transcript.cn: 另外它的温控也有问题。

transcript.en: Woman: It's now 10 degrees, but I set it to be minus 8.
transcript.cn: 现在里面是10度，可我明明设的是零下8度。

transcript.en: Woman: It seemed to be working fine for the first couple of days.
transcript.cn: 头几天用着还挺正常的。

transcript.en: Man: Sorry about that, but rest assured, Madam.
transcript.cn: 真是抱歉，不过您放心，女士。

transcript.en: Man: We'll fix it all.
transcript.cn: 我们会把这些问题都修好的。

transcript.en: Woman: Where is your maintenance centre?
transcript.cn: 你们的维修中心在哪儿？

transcript.en: Man: Ken's Appliance is located on Elm Street, just a few steps from the station.
transcript.cn: 肯氏电器在榆树街（Elm Street），离车站就几步路。

transcript.en: Man: And, did the broken fridge cause any loss to you?
transcript.cn: 对了，冰箱坏了有没有给您造成什么损失？

transcript.en: Woman: Yes, actually it was used to store food for my sandwich shop.
transcript.cn: 有啊，其实这台冰箱是用来给我三明治店存放食材的。

transcript.en: Man: Any idea of the total value of loss?
transcript.cn: 大概估算下来损失总共有多少？

transcript.en: Woman: Let me make an estimate here.
transcript.cn: 我在这儿算算看。

transcript.en: Woman: The vegetables in the fridge cost me around $50, and the meat cost more than $100.
transcript.cn: 冰箱里的蔬菜花了我大概50美元，肉类花了100多美元。

transcript.en: Woman: So the overall loss is about $180.
transcript.cn: 所以总损失大约是180美元。

transcript.en: Woman: I didn't notice the abnormal temperature until something inside went bad and the whole fridge smelled terrible.
transcript.cn: 我一开始没注意到温度不正常，直到里面有东西坏掉、整个冰箱都发出难闻的臭味我才发现。

transcript.en: Woman: I had to toss everything away.
transcript.cn: 我只能把所有东西都扔了。

transcript.en: Woman: Luckily, no one ate the food inside and got sick.
transcript.cn: 还好没人吃了里面的东西闹肚子。

transcript.en: Man: That's a relief.
transcript.cn: 那就好，松了口气。

transcript.en: Woman: But the damage has really caused me great inconvenience.
transcript.cn: 但这次损坏确实给我带来了很大的麻烦。

transcript.en: Woman: I've nowhere to put the raw materials and thus could not open for business these days.
transcript.cn: 我没地方放原材料，所以这几天店都没法开门营业。

transcript.en: Woman: The longer it takes to fix the fridge, the more it will cost me.
transcript.cn: 冰箱修得越慢，我的损失就越大。

transcript.en: Woman: You know … I have a whole bunch of bills to pay, like water, electricity, rent …
transcript.cn: 你知道的……我还有一大堆账单要付，水费、电费、房租什么的……

transcript.en: Man: Don't worry, we'll attend to your problems as soon as possible.
transcript.cn: 别担心，我们会尽快处理您的问题。

transcript.en: Woman: I need to know precisely when you can send a guy to fix all the problems.
transcript.cn: 我需要确切知道你们什么时候能派人来把这些问题都修好。

transcript.en: Woman: It is very urgent.
transcript.cn: 这事很紧急。

transcript.en: Woman: Is there anyone who can keep me posted on the latest information?
transcript.cn: 有没有人能随时把最新进展告诉我？

transcript.en: Man: How about this?
transcript.cn: 这样吧？

transcript.en: Man: I'll have the manager ring you later.
transcript.cn: 我让经理待会儿给您回个电话。

transcript.en: Man: Does that work for you?
transcript.cn: 这样您看行吗？

transcript.en: Woman: OK … I'll be expecting his call then.
transcript.cn: 好……那我就等他的电话了。

transcript.en: Woman: Do you know what exactly is wrong with the fridge?
transcript.cn: 你们知道冰箱具体是哪里出了问题吗？

transcript.en: Man: For your case, we assume it's the door that has to be fixed.
transcript.cn: 就您这个情况，我们估计是门需要修。

transcript.en: Man: The abnormal temperature and the noisy alarm both indicate that.
transcript.cn: 温度不正常和警报器一直响，都说明是门的问题。

transcript.en: Woman: Yes, indeed.
transcript.cn: 对，确实是。

transcript.en: Woman: I've just noticed that the door is dented.
transcript.cn: 我刚注意到门被撞凹了。

transcript.en: Man: It may have to be replaced then.
transcript.cn: 那可能得换一扇新门了。

transcript.en: Man: But we'll have to check the availability of our repair guy first.
transcript.cn: 不过我们得先看看维修师傅有没有空。

transcript.en: Man: We'll phone you back later.
transcript.cn: 我们稍后给您回电话。

transcript.en: Woman: OK, thank you.
transcript.cn: 好的，谢谢。

transcript.en: Man: You're welcome.
transcript.cn: 不客气。

transcript.en: Man: Bye.
transcript.cn: 再见。

groups.question_title: What tourist attraction does each of the following locations have?
groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
What tourist attraction does each of the following locations have?
Choose SIX answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-I, next to Questions 11-16.

questions.title: Sheepfoul
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Sheepfoul。
题目解析：本部分 6 道题的题干均为大写的地点名称，不会发生替换，精确定位后重点听选项的同义替换即可。定位词 Sheepfoul 原词重现后，答案信息由强调信号词 One thing that's definitely worth doing is 引出："… climbing to the top of the mountain. You will be fascinated by the beautiful scenery alongside the mountain road."其中 mountain 替换了选项 I 的 hills。因此答案为 I。

questions.title: Brown Mare
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Brown Mare。
题目解析：定位词 Brown Mare 原词重现，首先听到了干扰信息 farm，它虽与选项 A 的 farming life in the past 形似，但信息并非完全对应，且出现时附带了表示过去的时间 used to 以及随后的 isn't 予以了否定，可排除。真正的答案信息由转折信号词 But 引出："… you can walk for hours there in the peaceful green surroundings along a wide variety of tracks. I think you will be struck by the beautiful roses in Mother Nature."其中 roses 替换了选项 H 的 flowers，Mother Nature 体现了 wild。因此答案为 H。

questions.title: Doris
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Doris。
题目解析：定位词 Doris 出现后，答案信息同样是由转折信号词 but 引出："… they have been converted into a special section where animals and plants are protected."其中 a special section where animals and plants are protected 是对选项 B nature reserve 的解释说明。后面虽提到了 flowers，但没有体现 wild，注意排除。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: Lodge Estate
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Lodge Estate。
题目解析：定位词 Lodge Estate 出现后，答案信息随即出现："… which is the most favourite location for children as they can watch the baby deer."其中 baby deer 替换了选项 E 的 newly born deer，比较容易听出。因此答案为 E。

questions.title: Aurden
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Aurden。
题目解析：定位词 Aurden 出现后，答案信息由强调信号词 strongly recommend 引出："… that you visit the ancient town which was constructed nearly 1,000 years ago. There is not much of the original buildings left, but still plenty to see."其中 ancient、nearly 1,000 years ago、original 替换了选项 D 中的 old，buildings left 替换了 ruins（废墟）。因此答案为 D。

questions.title: Eastlake
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Eastlake。
题目解析：定位词 Eastlake 出现后，隔了半句出现了答案信息："At the moment when we arrive there, it will be the most spectacular month with the arrival of Canada geese."其中 Canada geese 是选项 F birds 的具体展开替换。因此答案为 F。

groups.question_title: Which TWO types of accommodation are available on a weekly basis?
groups.desc:
Questions 17 and 18
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 accommodation；提示词 on a weekly basis。
题目解析：定位词 accommodation 在录音中虽没有发生替换，但在听的过程中还是不能死板地抓字眼，而应通过语义的推进进行定位。首先听到选项 E 的 bed and breakfast，但录音中的 only available on a daily basis 与提示词 on a weekly basis 不符，故排除。随后听到选项 B 的 hostel，答案句为："More importantly, they don't have to change accommodation for a whole week."这句话是说"一个礼拜不用换地方住"，意思对应 on a weekly basis，故选项 B 正确。接着听到了选项 C 的 castles，不过只提及了要参观这个地点，而非住宿地点，故排除。最后听到了选项 D 的 cottages，答案句为："The owner promises that the rent can be paid every seven days, so just be relieved to have a peaceful life there."其中 every seven days 替换了 on a weekly basis，故选项 D 正确。选项 A 在录音中未提及。因此答案为 B & D。

听前预测：定位词 accommodation；提示词 on a weekly basis。
题目解析：定位词 accommodation 在录音中虽没有发生替换，但在听的过程中还是不能死板地抓字眼，而应通过语义的推进进行定位。首先听到选项 E 的 bed and breakfast，但录音中的 only available on a daily basis 与提示词 on a weekly basis 不符，故排除。随后听到选项 B 的 hostel，答案句为："More importantly, they don't have to change accommodation for a whole week."这句话是说"一个礼拜不用换地方住"，意思对应 on a weekly basis，故选项 B 正确。接着听到了选项 C 的 castles，不过只提及了要参观这个地点，而非住宿地点，故排除。最后听到了选项 D 的 cottages，答案句为："The owner promises that the rent can be paid every seven days, so just be relieved to have a peaceful life there."其中 every seven days 替换了 on a weekly basis，故选项 D 正确。选项 A 在录音中未提及。因此答案为 B & D。

groups.question_title: Which TWO benefits can all the members get?
groups.desc:
Questions 19 and 20
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 benefits；提示词 all the members。
题目解析：同 17-18 题，定位词 benefits 在录音中也没有发生替换，但还是应当通过抓取语义进行定位。首先听到了选项 C 中的 discount，但录音中说的是 only for premium members，与提示词 all the members 不符，故排除。接着听到了选项 E 中的 parking，但录音说的是 only offer free parking service to premium members as well，同样排除。随后听到了选项 D 中的 guide，第一个答案信息由 The good news is 引出："… all of you can enjoy our guide service without any charge, including the visit to attractions like the castles."其中 all of you 符合 all the members，guide service without any charge 替换了选项 D 的 free visitor guide，故选项 D 正确。选项 A 中的 free entry 为干扰信息，录音中提到时说的是 paid by yourself，可排除。最后由 you can also 引出另一个答案信息："… receive regular copies of magazines about the native food and attractions in Scotland absolutely for free. It's a gift for you."其中 receive regular copies of magazines 替换了选项 B 中的 subscription of … magazines，in Scotland 对应 Scottish，a gift for you 符合 all the members 的限定，故选项 B 也正确。因此答案为 B & D。

听前预测：定位词 benefits；提示词 all the members。
题目解析：同 17-18 题，定位词 benefits 在录音中也没有发生替换，但还是应当通过抓取语义进行定位。首先听到了选项 C 中的 discount，但录音中说的是 only for premium members，与提示词 all the members 不符，故排除。接着听到了选项 E 中的 parking，但录音说的是 only offer free parking service to premium members as well，同样排除。随后听到了选项 D 中的 guide，第一个答案信息由 The good news is 引出："… all of you can enjoy our guide service without any charge, including the visit to attractions like the castles."其中 all of you 符合 all the members，guide service without any charge 替换了选项 D 的 free visitor guide，故选项 D 正确。选项 A 中的 free entry 为干扰信息，录音中提到时说的是 paid by yourself，可排除。最后由 you can also 引出另一个答案信息："… receive regular copies of magazines about the native food and attractions in Scotland absolutely for free. It's a gift for you."其中 receive regular copies of magazines 替换了选项 B 中的 subscription of … magazines，in Scotland 对应 Scottish，a gift for you 符合 all the members 的限定，故选项 B 也正确。因此答案为 B & D。

transcript.en: Good morning everyone, I'm Sally, tour guide from Travelite Travel Agency.
transcript.cn: 大家早上好，我是萨莉（Sally），来自Travelite旅行社的导游。

transcript.en: Today I'm going to introduce a great trip to Southern Scotland for you.
transcript.cn: 今天我要给大家介绍一趟很棒的苏格兰南部之旅。

transcript.en: I'm sure you will find it a fantastic place.
transcript.cn: 我保证你们会觉得那是个绝妙的地方。

transcript.en: There is lots to see in Southern Scotland.
transcript.cn: 苏格兰南部有很多值得一看的地方。

transcript.en: To begin with, we will go to Sheepfoul, which has one or two beautiful gardens.
transcript.cn: 首先，我们会去Sheepfoul，那里有一两座漂亮的花园。

transcript.en: One thing that's definitely worth doing is climbing to the top of the mountain.
transcript.cn: 有件事绝对值得一做，那就是爬到山顶。

transcript.en: You will be fascinated by the beautiful scenery alongside the mountain road.
transcript.cn: 沿着山路的美景一定会让你着迷。

transcript.en: When you get to the top, you can overlook the coastline and enjoy the stunning view.
transcript.cn: 等你到了山顶，就能俯瞰整条海岸线，欣赏那令人惊叹的景色。

transcript.en: From there we will go on to Brown Mare.
transcript.cn: 从那儿我们会接着前往Brown Mare。

transcript.en: Brown Mare used to be famous for its farm, but it is being refurbished at the moment and isn't likely to be reopened by the time we go there.
transcript.cn: Brown Mare过去以它的农场闻名，不过现在正在翻修，我们去的时候多半还没重新开放。

transcript.en: But you can walk for hours there in the peaceful green surroundings along a wide variety of tracks.
transcript.cn: 但你可以在那片宁静的绿色环境里，沿着各种各样的小径散步好几个小时。

transcript.en: I think you will be struck by the beautiful roses in Mother Nature.
transcript.cn: 我想大自然中那些美丽的玫瑰一定会让你惊艳。

transcript.en: In Doris, there were several old barns, but they have been converted into a special section where animals and plants are protected.
transcript.cn: 在Doris，原本有几座旧谷仓，不过它们已经被改建成了一个专门保护动植物的区域。

transcript.en: From there you can see a range of rare breeds as well as flowers.
transcript.cn: 在那里你能看到一系列稀有品种，还有各种花卉。

transcript.en: This place is usually favoured by university students as a destination for their field trips.
transcript.cn: 这个地方通常很受大学生欢迎，是他们实地考察的热门去处。

transcript.en: Then we will go to Lodge Estate, which is the most favourite location for children as they can watch the baby deer.
transcript.cn: 接着我们会去Lodge Estate，那是孩子们最喜欢的地方，因为他们可以看小鹿。

transcript.en: But remember, don't give food to them.
transcript.cn: 不过记住，别喂它们东西吃。

transcript.en: Photography is allowed there, and when you leave you can get one free photo at the exit.
transcript.cn: 那里是可以拍照的，而且离开的时候，你能在出口领到一张免费照片。

transcript.en: But please don't move rocks or branches to take photos.
transcript.cn: 但请不要为了拍照去搬石头或者折树枝。

transcript.en: You should leave the site intact.
transcript.cn: 你应该让景点保持原样。

transcript.en: Our next stop is Aurden.
transcript.cn: 我们下一站是Aurden。

transcript.en: I strongly recommend that you visit the ancient town which was constructed nearly 1,000 years ago.
transcript.cn: 我强烈建议大家去参观那座古镇，它是将近一千年前建造的。

transcript.en: There is not much of the original buildings left, but still plenty to see.
transcript.cn: 原来的建筑没剩下多少了，但还是有很多值得看的东西。

transcript.en: The site is being excavated, and you will be able to help out if you want to.
transcript.cn: 这个遗址正在发掘中，如果你愿意的话，还可以搭把手帮忙。

transcript.en: Finally, we will spend some time in Eastlake, which changes with the seasons with different events happening at different times of the year.
transcript.cn: 最后，我们会在Eastlake待上一段时间，那里随四季变化，一年中不同时节会有不同的活动。

transcript.en: At the moment when we arrive there, it will be the most spectacular month with the arrival of Canada geese.
transcript.cn: 我们到那儿的时候，正赶上最壮观的月份，加拿大雁会成群飞来。

transcript.en: I'm pretty sure that this visit will give you an unforgettable experience.
transcript.cn: 我敢肯定，这次参观会给你们带来一段难忘的体验。

transcript.en: Some of you have asked me about the place where we're going to stay.
transcript.cn: 你们有些人问过我我们要住在哪儿。

transcript.en: So, next I will introduce different types of accommodation there.
transcript.cn: 所以接下来我给大家介绍一下那里几种不同的住宿方式。

transcript.en: First, many tourists may consider visiting a bed and breakfast, also called a B&B, as they don't have to be worried about what to eat in the morning.
transcript.cn: 首先，很多游客可能会考虑住民宿，也就是所谓的B&B（住宿加早餐），因为这样早上就不用发愁吃什么了。

transcript.en: But you have to pay attention that this type of accommodation is only available on a daily basis.
transcript.cn: 但你们得注意，这种住宿只能按天预订。

transcript.en: The cheapest possible option is to stay in a hostel, but you should be aware that sometimes you are provided with only a single bed with several people sharing the same room, and meals are not included.
transcript.cn: 最省钱的选择是住青年旅舍，不过你要有心理准备，有时候只提供一张单人床，还得跟好几个人合住一间房，而且不含餐。

transcript.en: But some people think they have never had such an experience before that they want to have a try.
transcript.cn: 但有些人觉得自己以前从没有过这种经历，就想试一试。

transcript.en: More importantly, they don't have to change accommodation for a whole week.
transcript.cn: 更重要的是，他们一整周都不用换地方住。

transcript.en: For those who want to visit the castles, I recommend you stay in the cottages nearby with beautiful surroundings.
transcript.cn: 对于想去参观城堡的人，我建议你们住在附近的小屋里，那儿环境很美。

transcript.en: The owner promises that the rent can be paid every seven days, so just be relieved to have a peaceful life there.
transcript.cn: 屋主承诺房租可以每七天付一次，所以尽管放心，在那儿好好享受一段安宁的日子吧。

transcript.en: For our members, I will introduce some benefits you can get from our travel agency.
transcript.cn: 针对我们的会员，我来介绍几项你们能从我们旅行社获得的福利。

transcript.en: As for the accommodation I just mentioned, someone has asked if we offer a discount.
transcript.cn: 关于我刚提到的住宿，有人问我们提不提供折扣。

transcript.en: I'm afraid to tell you this is only for premium members who can benefit from 10% off the original price.
transcript.cn: 很抱歉，这个只对高级会员开放，他们能享受原价九折的优惠。

transcript.en: For those self-driving travellers, you might be interested in the parking service.
transcript.cn: 对于那些自驾游的游客，你们可能会对停车服务感兴趣。

transcript.en: Parking space is always limited at the hotel, so we only offer free parking service to premium members as well.
transcript.cn: 酒店的停车位一向很紧张，所以我们同样只对高级会员提供免费停车服务。

transcript.en: I'm afraid ordinary members have to pay a fee for parking.
transcript.cn: 很抱歉，普通会员停车得付费。

transcript.en: The good news is, all of you can enjoy our guide service without any charge, including the visit to attractions like the castles.
transcript.cn: 好消息是，你们所有人都能免费享受我们的导游服务，包括参观城堡这类景点。

transcript.en: But remember, the entrance fee has to be paid by yourself.
transcript.cn: 但记住，门票得你们自己出。

transcript.en: Oh, I nearly forgot, you can also receive regular copies of magazines about the native food and attractions in Scotland absolutely for free.
transcript.cn: 哦对了，我差点忘了，你们还能定期免费收到介绍苏格兰当地美食和景点的杂志。

transcript.en: It's a gift for you.
transcript.cn: 这是送给你们的礼物。

transcript.en: I hope you will like it.
transcript.cn: 希望你们会喜欢。

transcript.en: OK, that's all I want to share today.
transcript.cn: 好，今天我要分享的就这些。

transcript.en: If you have any more questions about the trip, please call me at …
transcript.cn: 如果你们对这趟行程还有什么问题，请打电话给我，号码是……

groups.title: SUVs (Sports Utility Vehicles)
groups.desc:
Questions 21-30
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
groups.collect: SUVs (Sports Utility Vehicles) Purposes • initially made for off-road driving in remote areas • now often found in $21$ Advantages • available for $22$ purpose • larger $23$ capacity • can haul heavy cargo Reasons for popularity • due to their image • seen as $24$ by mothers • greater seating capacity • drivers like their $25$ Disadvantages • SUVs can be $26$ in urban centres because of their $27$ • the bodywork won't deform in the collision to absorb impact energy • they are liable to $28$ How to limit the use of SUVs • limit use to those people who need them (e.g. $29$) • raise cost of $30$ for drivers

questions.title: now often found in 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 found in，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：注意 now 为时间限定。本题没有很好的定位词，可通过同一小标题下的上一条信息进行定位，其中 off-road 原词重现，remote areas 在录音中被替换为 areas with quite a distance，initially made for 在录音中被替换为 first designed for，这对应的是过去的情况。紧接着转折信号词 but 出现，注意听与现在相关的情况，并抓取符合预判的词汇："… the interesting thing is that at present they're also frequently used by people who live in cities." 其中 at present 替换了 now，frequently 替换了 often，能和 in 搭配的只有 cities。因此答案为 cities。

questions.title: available for 【   】 purpose
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 for、purpose，此处应填形容词。
题目解析：本题也没有很好的定位词。通过观察题干可知，小标题 Advantages 之下的三条信息应该并列为 SUV 的优势或优点，注意在 Advantages 或其同义替换出现后，通过逻辑关系有意识地抓取符合预判的词汇代入题干。Advantages 在录音中原词重现，接着听到了表示序列关系的信号词 first，暗示第一个优势即将出现："… they're generally used for commercial reasons, right?" 接着是肯定回答，直接抓取符合预判的词汇即可。因此答案为 commercial。

questions.title: larger 【   】 capacity
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 larger、capacity，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题依然可通过逻辑关系进行定位，录音中的 What else 暗示下一个优势即将出现，紧接着便听到了回答："… another advantage from my notes is that the power of the engine is increased." 其中 power 替换了题干中的 capacity，is increased 替换了 larger。因此答案为 engine。

questions.title: seen as 【   】 by mothers
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 image、mothers；提示词 as，此处应填形容词或名词。
题目解析：通过观察题干可知，小标题 Reasons for popularity 之下的四条信息应该并列为 SUV 流行的原因，注意结合逻辑关系抓取符合预判的词汇。本题不难，上一条信息中的 image 在录音中原词重现，定位词 mothers 在录音中被替换为 moms，很好识别，附近符合题干的词汇只有 safe，此外并列信号词 another 进一步帮助确认答案。因此答案为 safe。

questions.title: drivers like their 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 drivers；提示词 their，此处应填名词。
题目解析：上一条信息中的 seating capacity 出现后，注意结合逻辑关系的递进和定位词抓取符合预判的词汇。本题中的 drivers 在录音中原词重现，答案信息紧接着出现："… tend to buy SUVs with higher seats, which means they can get a better view of the traffic ahead." 其中 tend to buy … with 意思上等同于题干中的 like。注意不能填 better view，因为它的信息不完整；完整的信息应该是 better view of the traffic，但不符合字数要求。因此答案为 higher seats。

questions.title: SUVs can be 【   】 in urban centres because of their 27
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 urban centres；提示词 can be，此处应填形容词。
题目解析：小标题 Disadvantages 下的三条信息应该并列为 SUV 的劣势或缺点，注意在 Disadvantages 或其同义替换出现后，通过逻辑关系有意识地抓取符合预判的词汇代入题干。Disadvantages 在录音中原词重现，接着听到了表示序列关系的信号词 firstly，暗示第一个劣势即将出现："… we can see that SUVs are harmful in central areas, …" 其中 central areas 替换了题干中的 urban centres。因此答案为 harmful。

questions.title: SUVs can be 26 in urban centres because of their 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 urban centres；提示词 their，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题紧跟上一题，很容易错过。答案信息为："… and the damage they cause is highly related to their weight." 其中 is highly related to 对应题干中的 because of。注意不能填 damage，该词代入题干之后逻辑不通。因此答案为 weight。

questions.title: they are liable to 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 are liable to，此处应填动词原形。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，可通过上一条信息的相关描述和逻辑关系的递进进行定位。在 bodywork 的相关描述之后，听到了并列信号词 moreover，暗示答案信息即将出现："… as SUVs have a high centre of gravity, it's more likely for them to roll over than ordinary cars." 其中 more likely 替换了 liable（易……的），抓取其后的动词原形即可。因此答案为 roll over。

questions.title: limit use to those people who need them (e.g. 【   】)
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 people、e.g.，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：第 29 题和第 30 题应同属于限制 SUV 使用的方法，可结合小标题和逻辑关系词进行定位。小标题在录音中基本原词重现，随后出现了并列信号词 For one thing，锁定答案句为："… I think we should restrict them to people like farmers, to whom SUVs are used very frequently." 其中 restrict 替换了题干中的 limit，like 对应 e.g.，抓取表示人的名词即可。因此答案为 farmers。

questions.title: raise cost of 【   】 for drivers
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 cost、drivers；提示词 of，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题定位词 cost 并未出现，drivers 出现于答案词之后，注意通过语义的递进进行定位。答案句为："And I think companies could also increase the insurance paid by SUV drivers, …" 其中 And 和 also 说明这条信息与上一条信息并列，increase 替换了题干中的 raise。听录音时，要随时记下符合预判的词汇代入题干，然后再通过之后出现的信息进一步验证。因此答案为 insurance。

transcript.en: Student 1: Hello guys, how have you been getting on with your research on four-wheel drive vehicles?
transcript.cn: 嘿，各位，你们关于四驱车的调研进展得怎么样了？

transcript.en: Student 2: Fine, and we've been working hard on that to collect relevant data.
transcript.cn: 挺顺利的，我们一直在努力收集相关数据。

transcript.en: Student 2: Shall we discuss what we've each found together?
transcript.cn: 我们要不要把各自查到的东西一起讨论一下？

transcript.en: Student 1: Yes, and then we can think about how we will put our data together, as you see, we have to do a presentation in next week's marketing seminar, OK?
transcript.cn: 好啊，然后我们可以想想怎么把数据整合起来，你们也知道，下周的市场营销研讨课上我们得做个展示，对吧？

transcript.en: Student 3: Yeah, sure. I think first we should talk about the purposes for which these cars were originally designed.
transcript.cn: 嗯，当然。我觉得我们首先应该聊聊这些车最初是为什么用途设计的。

transcript.en: Student 2: Oh, I've found some data on that here. Well, four-wheel drives or sports utility vehicles as they're officially known, SUVs for short, were actually first designed for off-road use by those who need to get to the areas with quite a distance, but the interesting thing is that at present they're also frequently used by people who live in cities.
transcript.cn: 哦，这方面的资料我这儿查到了一些。四驱车，也就是官方名称叫运动型多用途车、简称SUV的车，其实最早是为那些需要长途开到偏远地区的人设计的，用来越野。但有意思的是，现在住在城里的人也经常开它。

transcript.en: Student 1: That's right. From this we can see how they make use of them differently. Then in the second part let's talk about their advantages, shall we?
transcript.cn: 没错。从这一点能看出人们对它的使用方式很不一样。那第二部分我们来说说它们的优点吧，好吗？

transcript.en: Student 2: Yeah. Let me look at here. OK, first, they're generally used for commercial reasons, right?
transcript.cn: 好。我看看这儿。嗯，首先，它们一般是出于商业用途，对吧？

transcript.en: Student 3: Yes, that's the same with what I've found.
transcript.cn: 对，跟我查到的一样。

transcript.en: Student 1: OK. What else?
transcript.cn: 好。还有别的吗？

transcript.en: Student 2: Well, another advantage from my notes is that the power of the engine is increased.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我笔记里的另一个优点是，它发动机的动力更强。

transcript.en: Student 3: Yes, I think that's a big benefit. In addition, I've got one more point here - SUVs are heavier, so they're suitable for towing larger loads.
transcript.cn: 对，我觉得这是个大优势。另外，我这儿还有一点——SUV更重，所以适合拖挂更大的载重。

transcript.en: Student 1: So, that's why SUVs have become so popular in the market then?
transcript.cn: 那这就是SUV在市场上变得这么受欢迎的原因喽？

transcript.en: Student 2: Oh, that's part of it. But they've gained popularity now for rather different reasons. For example, relevant research shows that people buy them for business mainly because of the image they present. And nowadays, many moms like to drive their kids to school in SUVs because they think that they're safe, so that's another reason.
transcript.cn: 哦，这只是一部分原因。但它们现在受欢迎，其实是出于一些相当不同的原因。比如说，相关研究显示，人们买它做生意主要是看中它展现出的形象。而现在很多妈妈喜欢开SUV送孩子上学，因为她们觉得这车安全，所以这是另一个原因。

transcript.en: Student 3: And then I think a larger seating capacity is also a factor, you know, we can get about seven people into one SUV, while in an ordinary car, there are only five seats.
transcript.cn: 还有，我觉得座位更多也是一个因素，你们知道的，一辆SUV能坐大概七个人，而普通轿车只有五个座位。

transcript.en: Student 1: Yeah, and I think that's why families with two or more children like to buy SUVs.
transcript.cn: 对，我想这就是为什么有两个或更多孩子的家庭喜欢买SUV。

transcript.en: Student 3: Right, and another thing I've found from my research is that drivers tend to buy SUVs with higher seats, which means they can get a better view of the traffic ahead.
transcript.cn: 没错。我调研里还发现另一点，就是司机倾向于买座位更高的SUV，这样他们能更清楚地看到前方的路况。

transcript.en: Student 1: Yeah, so these are all the reasons.
transcript.cn: 嗯，所以这些就是全部原因了。

transcript.en: Student 2: But I think some of these reasons just don't work. For example, to some extent, SUVs are safe, but if we look at them in a collision, they can do terrible damage to a small car. So I think it's just a misconception.
transcript.cn: 但我觉得其中有些理由根本站不住脚。比如说，SUV在某种程度上是安全，可要是发生碰撞，它会给小轿车造成很严重的损害。所以我认为这只是个误区。

transcript.en: Student 3: Hum, I agree with you. So next shall we discuss the disadvantages of SUVs?
transcript.cn: 嗯，我同意你的看法。那接下来我们讨论一下SUV的缺点吧？

transcript.en: Student 1: OK. So, firstly from what we've just considered, we can see that SUVs are harmful in central areas, and the damage they cause is highly related to their weight. Right?
transcript.cn: 好。那首先，从我们刚才分析的来看，能发现SUV在市中心区域是有害的，而且它们造成的损害跟车重高度相关。对吧？

transcript.en: Student 2: Yes. And I've also got something about their chassis. The bodywork on SUVs is stiffer, so it doesn't crumple to absorb impact in an accident the way it does in smaller cars.
transcript.cn: 对。关于它们的底盘我也查到了点东西。SUV的车身更硬，所以出事故时它不会像小轿车那样通过溃缩来吸收撞击力。

transcript.en: Student 3: Hum, moreover, as SUVs have a high centre of gravity, it's more likely for them to roll over than ordinary cars. That's another disadvantage from my research.
transcript.cn: 嗯，而且，由于SUV重心高，它们比普通轿车更容易翻车。这是我调研里发现的另一个缺点。

transcript.en: Student 1: Good. So these are all the disadvantages. How about the last part?
transcript.cn: 很好。那这些就是全部缺点了。最后一部分怎么办？

transcript.en: Student 3: Well, maybe we could end up with a few ideas on how to limit the use of these SUVs.
transcript.cn: 嗯，也许我们可以在结尾提几点建议，说说怎么限制这些SUV的使用。

transcript.en: Student 1: OK. For one thing, I think we should restrict them to people like farmers, to whom SUVs are used very frequently.
transcript.cn: 好。首先，我觉得我们应该把它们限定给像农民这样的人使用，因为SUV对他们来说是非常常用的。

transcript.en: Student 2: Hum, that's a good idea, but it might be difficult to enforce. And I think companies could also increase the insurance paid by SUV drivers, as we know it will cause more damage when there is an accident.
transcript.cn: 嗯，这主意不错，不过可能很难执行。我还觉得，保险公司也可以提高SUV司机所付的保费，因为我们知道一旦出事故它造成的损害更大。

transcript.en: Student 3: Hum, that's a good idea too. I think we've got very useful information together. Next, I'll write up these notes onto the slide so that everyone can see them when we give the presentation in the seminar.
transcript.cn: 嗯，这主意也很好。我觉得我们凑到了非常有用的信息。接下来我把这些笔记整理到幻灯片上，这样研讨课上做展示时大家都能看到了。

transcript.en: Student 1 & Student 2: Good idea.
transcript.cn: 好主意。

groups.desc:
Questions 31 and 32
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: Participants in the learner persistence study were all drawn from the same
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Participants；提示词 same。
题目解析：注意 learner persistence 是全篇的主题词，难以用于定位。另外，定位词 Participants 也可能会发生替换，所以在听的过程中不可死板地抓字眼，而是应该根据意思去听取表示研究对象的词。首先听到 “… first I selected my undergraduate students as the research sample … All the students selected were seniors …”，但 undergraduate students 和 seniors 并不意味着他们年龄相同。接着听到选项 A age 的相关信息出现在了 Although 引导的从句中：“… the sample was drawn from a range of ages …” 其中 a range of 与提示词 same 不符，可排除选项 A。最后听到了真正的答案信息：“And there was one thing in common – all of those students were living at home in the local region.” 其中 in common、all 与提示词 same 相符，living at home in the local region 替换了选项 B 的 geographical area。选项 C 在录音中未涉及。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: The study showed that when starting their course, older students were most worried about
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 older students；提示词 most worried about。
题目解析：注意题干中的 older 和 most 都为条件限定。在听录音时不可死板地抓题干的原词，而是应该根据语义进行定位。提示词中的 worried 在录音中被替换为 concerns，之后首先听到了选项 C 中的 financial，接着听到了选项 B 中的 career，这两项由表示对比的 while 引导，动作的发出者分别是 some 和 others，不符合 older 限定，且没有体现 most，可同时排除。真正的答案信息由转折信号词 However 引出：“… the biggest concern for mature students tended to be the relationship with their children at home.” 其中 biggest concern 呼应提示词 most worried about，mature students 替换了题干中的 older students，the relationship with their children at home 替换了选项 A 的 effects on their home life。因此答案为 A。

groups.title: Research findings
groups.desc:
Questions 33-37
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

questions.title: Enjoyment of a 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Personal Characteristics、Enjoyment；提示词 a，此处应填单数名词。
题目解析：表格填空题通常难度不大，一般可通过标题栏的名称进行定位，然后抓取符合预判的词汇即可。纵向标题 Personal Characteristics 在录音中原词重现，接着听到：“… a sizable percentage of participants said that they liked to take up a challenge, which was seen as a very important factor.” 其中 liked to 替换了题干中的 Enjoyment。因此答案为 challenge。

questions.title: Positive experiences at 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Second level、Social and Environmental Factors、Positive experiences；提示词 at，此处应填名词。
题目解析：通过横向和纵向标题进行定位，其中 Social and Environmental Factors 在录音中被表达为 the first category，之后注意抓取能跟 at 搭配使用的名词即可。另一个定位词 Positive experiences 于答案之后出现，在录音中被替换为 good experiences。因此答案为 school。

questions.title: Good 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Other Factors、Good；提示词 Good，此处应填名词。
题目解析：通过纵向标题进行定位，定位词 Other Factors 在录音中原词重现，紧接着答案信息出现：“… a lot of people said that the most significant thing was decent health …” 其中 decent（相当好的）替换了题干中的 Good。因此答案为 health。

questions.title: Many 【   】 in daily life
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Personal Characteristics、daily life；提示词 Many，此处应填名词。
题目解析：通过纵向标题进行定位，Personal Characteristics 在录音中被表达为 the third column，答案信息随后出现：“… quite a number of respondents had the same view that they should have a range of interests in their everyday lives …” 其中 a range of 替换了题干中的 Many，everyday lives 替换了 daily life，比较容易听出。因此答案为 interests。

questions.title: Good interaction with the 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Third level、Social and Environmental Factors、interaction；提示词 the，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：通过横向和纵向标题进行定位，其中 Social and Environmental Factors 在录音中被表达为 social factors，紧接着听到了答案句：“… several respondents said that they had been keeping close to their tutors …” 其中 keeping close to 替换了题干中的 Good interaction with。因此答案为 tutors。

groups.title: Recommendations
groups.desc:
Questions 38-40
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.collect: Recommendations • Ask new students to complete questionnaires to gauge their level of $38$. • Train the selected students to act as $39$. • Outside office hours, offer $40$ help. • Follow up students who miss deadlines.

questions.title: Ask new students to complete questionnaires to gauge their level of 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 new students、questionnaires；提示词 of，此处应填名词。
题目解析：通过观察题干可知，小标题 Recommendations 之下的四条信息应该并列为具体的建议，注意在 Recommendations 或其同义替换出现后，通过逻辑关系定位并有意识地抓取符合预判的词汇代入题干。Recommendations 在录音中未发生替换，接着听到了逻辑信号词 Primarily（首先），暗示第一条建议即将出现：“I suggest that we should distribute questionnaires to the freshmen, so as to make clear of their maturity when they begin the course.” 其中 questionnaires 重现，freshmen 替换了题干中的 new students。可能会有考生不认识题干中的 gauge（判断）一词，也没有听到 level 在录音中相应的替换，但其实依然可以技巧性地抓取定位句附近符合题干要求的名词。因此答案为 maturity。

questions.title: Train the selected students to act as 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 selected students；提示词 as，此处应填名词。
题目解析：通过逻辑信号词 Secondly 可判断第二条建议即将出现。selected students 在录音中被表达为 students who are selected，很容易听出，答案随后出现：“… to encourage them to play the role of advisors.” 其中 play the role of 替换了题干中的 act as。因此答案为 advisors。

questions.title: Outside office hours, offer 【   】 help.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Outside office hours；提示词 offer、help，此处应填形容词。
题目解析：通过逻辑信号词 Thirdly 可判断第三条建议即将出现。Outside office hours 在录音中被表达为 when offices are closed，答案随后出现：“As a result, I think we should provide online services to those in need.” 其中 provide 替换了题干中的 offer，services 意思等同于 help。因此答案为 online。

transcript.en: Today I'm going to talk about my research on learner persistence.
transcript.cn: 今天我要讲的是我关于学习者坚持性（learner persistence）的研究。

transcript.en: Let me first introduce why I wanted to carry out such research.
transcript.cn: 我先来介绍一下我为什么想做这样一项研究。

transcript.en: As a university teacher, I found learners' responses to certain things vary a lot.
transcript.cn: 作为一名大学老师，我发现学生们对某些事情的反应差别很大。

transcript.en: For example, some students may completely give up their degree studies because of a temporary illness, while others may overcome all kinds of difficulties and try their best to continue their studies.
transcript.cn: 比如说，有些学生可能因为一场暂时的疾病就彻底放弃了学位学业，而另一些学生却能克服种种困难，尽全力坚持学下去。

transcript.en: The latter are the students with learner persistence, and this is the group that I'm particularly interested in.
transcript.cn: 后者就是具备学习者坚持性的学生，也正是我特别感兴趣的这一群体。

transcript.en: To do the research, first I selected my undergraduate students as the research sample, with a total of 200 people.
transcript.cn: 为了做这项研究，我首先选取了我的本科生作为研究样本，一共200人。

transcript.en: All the students selected were seniors, and they had already stayed the course very well.
transcript.cn: 被选中的都是大四学生，他们已经把整个课程坚持得相当好了。

transcript.en: Although the sample was drawn from a range of ages, there were deliberately a large number of mature students.
transcript.cn: 虽然样本涵盖了不同年龄段，但我特意选了很多成年学生（mature students）。

transcript.en: And there was one thing in common – all of those students were living at home in the local region.
transcript.cn: 而且他们有一个共同点——所有这些学生都住在本地区的家里。

transcript.en: I wanted to maintain this element of consistency, so I didn't include those coming from outside this area.
transcript.cn: 我想保持这一致性因素，所以没有把来自本地区以外的学生纳入进来。

transcript.en: Then I designed a questionnaire that aimed to find out what their concerns had been when they began the course and then what had made them stick at the three-year studies in university.
transcript.cn: 然后我设计了一份问卷，目的是弄清楚他们刚开始上课时都有哪些顾虑，以及后来是什么让他们坚持完了大学三年的学业。

transcript.en: Findings from the first section pointed out there were different concerns when they started their university studies.
transcript.cn: 第一部分的调查结果显示，他们在开始大学学业时有着各种不同的顾虑。

transcript.en: For example, some worried about the financial circumstances, while others were concerned about their careers after graduation.
transcript.cn: 比如说，有些人担心经济状况，另一些人则担心毕业后的职业问题。

transcript.en: However, the research found the biggest concern for mature students tended to be the relationship with their children at home.
transcript.cn: 不过研究发现，成年学生最大的顾虑往往是他们和家里孩子的关系。

transcript.en: Next I wanted to find out what had made those students persist with their university studies.
transcript.cn: 接下来我想弄清楚是什么让这些学生坚持完成了大学学业。

transcript.en: So in the second part, I designed my questionnaire under three main headings: social and environmental factors, other factors, and personal characteristics.
transcript.cn: 所以在第二部分，我把问卷分成了三大类：社会与环境因素、其他因素，以及个人特质。

transcript.en: And I included three levels of importance for each of these three headings.
transcript.cn: 而且我给这三大类每一类都设了三个重要程度的等级。

transcript.en: At the first level, those points identified by the respondents were regarded as the most important in learner persistence.
transcript.cn: 在第一等级，被受访者选出的那些因素被视为在学习者坚持性中最重要的。

transcript.en: Let's look at them one by one.
transcript.cn: 我们来一个一个看。

transcript.en: For the first column, that's the social and environmental factors.
transcript.cn: 第一栏，也就是社会与环境因素。

transcript.en: A significant number of students said it was crucial to have effective support, whether from their tutors or friends.
transcript.cn: 相当多的学生表示，得到有效的支持至关重要，无论是来自导师还是朋友的支持。

transcript.en: For other factors, students were driven not so much by high grades, but by what they regarded as a success in their studies.
transcript.cn: 至于其他因素，学生们的动力与其说来自高分，不如说来自他们自己所认为的学业上的成功。

transcript.en: This was quite different from what I'd expected.
transcript.cn: 这跟我原先预想的很不一样。

transcript.en: Regarding personal characteristics, a sizable percentage of participants said they liked to take up a challenge, which was seen as a very important factor.
transcript.cn: 在个人特质方面，相当大比例的参与者表示他们喜欢迎接挑战，这被看作是一个非常重要的因素。

transcript.en: Then at the second level of importance, in the first category, many of the respondents regarded the life they enjoyed at school as an important social factor because this gave them good experiences.
transcript.cn: 再看第二等级的重要因素，在第一类里，很多受访者把在学校享受到的生活视为一个重要的社会因素，因为这给了他们美好的经历。

transcript.en: In the second column, other factors, a lot of people said that the most significant thing was decent health, which was also conducive to their persistence in the studies.
transcript.cn: 在第二栏，也就是其他因素里，很多人说最重要的是身体健康，这同样有助于他们坚持学业。

transcript.en: And then under the third column, quite a number of respondents had the same view that they should have a range of interests in their everyday lives because this could broaden their minds and give them a sense of perspective which less persistent learners might lack.
transcript.cn: 然后在第三栏之下，相当多的受访者持有同样的观点，认为自己在日常生活中应该有广泛的兴趣爱好，因为这能开阔视野，让他们拥有一种坚持性较差的学习者可能缺乏的全局观。

transcript.en: And then onto the third level of importance, under social factors, several respondents said that they had been keeping close to their tutors in their three-year university studies.
transcript.cn: 接着到第三等级的重要因素，在社会因素之下，有几位受访者说他们在大学三年里一直和导师保持着密切联系。

transcript.en: In the second column, for other factors, they mentioned it was very important to live in a family without any problems.
transcript.cn: 在第二栏其他因素里，他们提到生活在一个没有任何问题的家庭里非常重要。

transcript.en: And finally, under column three, they talked about the capacity for multi-tasking, which was the ability to simultaneously deal with different problems.
transcript.cn: 最后，在第三栏之下，他们谈到了多任务处理的能力，也就是同时应对不同问题的本领。

transcript.en: From these findings, I've concluded some recommendations on how to promote students' learner persistence.
transcript.cn: 根据这些调查结果，我总结出了几条关于如何提升学生学习者坚持性的建议。

transcript.en: Primarily, I suggest that we should distribute questionnaires to the freshmen, so as to make clear of their maturity when they begin the course.
transcript.cn: 首先，我建议我们应该向大一新生发放问卷，以便在他们开始上课时就摸清他们的成熟度。

transcript.en: This is really our most important concern.
transcript.cn: 这确实是我们最重要的关切点。

transcript.en: Secondly, I propose that we should find ways to offer some training sessions to the students who are selected to encourage them to play the role of advisors.
transcript.cn: 其次，我提议我们应该想办法给被选中的学生提供一些培训课程，鼓励他们扮演顾问的角色。

transcript.en: The purpose of this is to make support much more approachable to other students.
transcript.cn: 这么做的目的是让其他学生更容易获得支持。

transcript.en: Thirdly, in the evening and night when offices are closed, students may have no one to turn to for help.
transcript.cn: 第三，到了办公室关门的傍晚和夜里，学生们可能会求助无门。

transcript.en: As a result, I think we should provide online services to those in need.
transcript.cn: 因此，我认为我们应该为那些有需要的学生提供在线服务。

transcript.en: Researches have pointed out that this service is actually more accessible than traditional services.
transcript.cn: 有研究指出，这种服务实际上比传统服务更方便获取。

transcript.en: And finally, if students don't submit their assignments before the deadlines, I think we teachers should contact the students first, rather than waiting for the students to come to us.
transcript.cn: 最后，如果学生没能在截止日期前提交作业，我觉得我们老师应该主动先去联系学生，而不是干等着学生来找我们。

transcript.en: So, this is all I want to share on my research.
transcript.cn: 好，关于我的研究我要分享的就这些了。

transcript.en: Now let's turn to the next part.
transcript.cn: 现在我们进入下一部分。

transcript.en: Are there any questions about …
transcript.cn: 关于……有什么问题吗？
